title: After Venezuela Earthquakes, La Guaira Residents Search for Loved Ones in the Rubble
summary_full: A missing child. A boyfriend in the rubble. Venezuelans on Thursday were still trying to understand the scope of the devastation in this hard-hit city.
summary_public: A missing child. A boyfriend in the rubble. Venezuelans on Thursday were still trying to understand the scope of the devastation in this hard-hit city.
